examples: So he stopped thinking of killing Claudius for the moment.
Polonius went to Claudius and Gertrude to let them know what caused Hamlet's madness.
Claudius had determined that married men made poor soldiers. So he banned marriage from his empire.
Engineer Claudius Mittendorfer, who worked on projects by Arctic Monkeys, Muse and others, pitched in.
Claudius Ptolemy and Galen, respectively an astronomer and a physician, and Plotinus and Philo, who were both philosophers.
